# convert_pdf_files_to_images ツール下書き

このファイルは ToolRegistry から半自動生成した下書きです。

## 概要
- description: Convert PDF files to page images

## 利用エージェント
- SuperVisorAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- ObjectiveEvaluationAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- IntakeAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- InvestigateAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- BackSupportEscalationAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- BackSupportInquiryWriterAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- ApprovalAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed
- TicketUpdateAgent: provider=builtin, target=convert_pdf_files_to_images, status=implemented, override=allowed

## 手編集メモ
